name: Northwest Grilled Samon
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salmon by filleting it and leaving the skin on. Keep the salmon cold.
2. Melt together the butter and honey in a microwave or another method.
3. Lay the fillet out with the skin side down. Quickly brush the melted butter and honey mixture over the fillet.
4. Sprinkle dill weed over the fillet.
5. Place the fillet skin side up on a moderate grill.
6. As soon as the meat starts to firm up, turn the fillet skin side down (the skin will keep the fillet together).
7. Remove from the grill when the meat starts to flake.
8. For large filets, use two spatulas for turning.
9. Serve with a green salad and au gratin potatoes.
